headline: The Charles Schwab Corporation (SCHW) Capitalizing on Business Momentum & Diversified Model
summary: The Charles Schwab Corporation (NYSE:SCHW) is one of Goldman Sachs top bank stocks to buy. headline: SCHD: Beating The Market At 3x The Yield
summary: SCHD is beating the S&P 500 in 2026, fueled by energy exposure, attractive value metrics and a 3.44% yield.

headline: Early Start, Long-Term Mindset: Teens Increasingly Interested in Investing
summary: WESTLAKE, Texas, April 28, 2026--Investing is now a family matter with teens looking to invest directly and their parents wanting them to start out the right way, according to the 2026 Schwab Teen Investing Survey. According to new data released today, seven in 10 teenagers (70%), ages 13-17, say they are very or extremely interested in investing and nearly three-quarters (73%) of parents say it is very important for teens to learn about investing.

headline: Teens Want to Learn About Investing. Their Preferred Source of Information Is Close to Home.
summary: A new survey from Charles Schwab highlights strong interest among younger teenagers in learning about tools to build wealth.
